title: Fix OAuth signup retry and site URL validation regressions
description: Implemented helper-based fixes for OAuth signup callback URLs, retry routing, age-gate resume behavior, and production site URL validation. Added regression coverage for preview runtime validation, email signup mode propagation, expired age-token recovery, and fail-closed age metadata persistence.
acceptance_criteria: OAuth signup and email confirmation retries preserve signup mode, stale age-gate state is cleared when re-verification is required, runtime and build-time site URL validation align on canonical Vercel production only, and regression tests cover these flows.
